SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr

Interface LogicalPlan

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable
All Known Subinterfaces:
LogicalPlan.Ddl, LogicalPlan.Distinct, LogicalPlan.Statement
All Known Implementing Classes:
LogicalPlan.Aggregate, LogicalPlan.Analyze, LogicalPlan.Copy, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateCatalog, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateCatalogSchema, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateExternalTable, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateFunction, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateIndex, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateMemoryTable, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateView, LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropCatalogSchema, LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropFunction, LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropTable, LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropView, LogicalPlan.DescribeTable, LogicalPlan.Distinct.All, LogicalPlan.Distinct.On, LogicalPlan.Dml, LogicalPlan.EmptyRelation, LogicalPlan.Explain, LogicalPlan.Extension, LogicalPlan.Filter, LogicalPlan.Join, LogicalPlan.Limit, LogicalPlan.Projection, LogicalPlan.RecursiveQuery, LogicalPlan.Repartition, LogicalPlan.Sort, LogicalPlan.Statement.Deallocate, LogicalPlan.Statement.Execute, LogicalPlan.Statement.Prepare, LogicalPlan.Statement.ResetVariable, LogicalPlan.Statement.SetVariable, LogicalPlan.Statement.TransactionEnd, LogicalPlan.Statement.TransactionStart, LogicalPlan.Subquery, LogicalPlan.SubqueryAlias, LogicalPlan.TableScan, LogicalPlan.Union, LogicalPlan.Unnest, LogicalPlan.Values, LogicalPlan.Window
public sealed interface LogicalPlan extends AutoCloseable permits LogicalPlan.Projection, LogicalPlan.Filter, LogicalPlan.Window, LogicalPlan.Aggregate, LogicalPlan.Sort, LogicalPlan.Join, LogicalPlan.Repartition, LogicalPlan.Union, LogicalPlan.TableScan, LogicalPlan.EmptyRelation, LogicalPlan.Subquery, LogicalPlan.SubqueryAlias, LogicalPlan.Limit, LogicalPlan.Statement, LogicalPlan.Values, LogicalPlan.Explain, LogicalPlan.Analyze, LogicalPlan.Extension, LogicalPlan.Distinct, LogicalPlan.Dml, LogicalPlan.Ddl, LogicalPlan.Copy, LogicalPlan.DescribeTable, LogicalPlan.Unnest, LogicalPlan.RecursiveQuery
A DataFusion logical plan node, corresponding to datafusion::logical_expr::LogicalPlan.

This sealed interface mirrors DataFusion's LogicalPlan enum. Each variant is a record that holds the plan node's data. Use instanceof pattern matching to inspect plan structure: 

LogicalPlan plan = state.createLogicalPlan("SELECT * FROM t WHERE x > 1");
if (plan instanceof LogicalPlan.Projection proj) {
    System.out.println("Projecting " + proj.exprs().size() + " columns");
    if (proj.input() instanceof LogicalPlan.Filter filter) {
        System.out.println("Filter: " + filter.predicate());
    }
}
See Also:
  • Rust DataFusion: LogicalPlan

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Aggregate
    Groups and aggregates data (GROUP BY).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Analyze
    Executes plan and prints physical plan with metrics (EXPLAIN ANALYZE).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Copy
    COPY TO for writing plan results to files.
    static interface 
    LogicalPlan.Ddl
    Data Definition Language operations (CREATE, DROP).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.DescribeTable
    Describes table schema (DESCRIBE command).
    static interface 
    LogicalPlan.Distinct
    Removes duplicate rows (SELECT DISTINCT).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Dml
    Data Manipulation Language operations (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.EmptyRelation
    Produces 0 or 1 placeholder rows (empty FROM clause).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Explain
    Shows plan structure (EXPLAIN).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Extension
    Custom relational operation defined outside DataFusion.
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Filter
    Filters rows that do not match a predicate (WHERE clause).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Join
    Joins two relations on join conditions.
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Limit
    Skips rows then fetches a limited count (LIMIT/OFFSET).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Projection
    Evaluates an arbitrary list of expressions (SELECT with expression list).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.RecursiveQuery
    Recursive CTEs (Common Table Expressions).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Repartition
    Repartitions input for parallelism.
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Sort
    Sorts input per sort expressions (ORDER BY).
    static interface 
    LogicalPlan.Statement
    A non-relational SQL statement (SET, TRANSACTION, PREPARE, EXECUTE).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Subquery
    Executes a nested query (subquery).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.SubqueryAlias
    Provides or changes the name of a relation (AS alias).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.TableScan
    Reads rows from a table (FROM clause).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Union
    Unions multiple inputs with the same schema (UNION ALL).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Unnest
    Unnests nested list/struct type columns (UNNEST).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Values
    Literal row values (VALUES clause).
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Window
    Window function computation (OVER clause).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    LogicalPlanBridge
    bridge()
    Returns the underlying bridge.
    default void
    close()
    Closes this plan node and all its children, releasing native resources.
    default boolean
    containsOuterReference()
    Whether this plan contains references to outer columns (correlated subquery).
    default String
    display()
    Single-line display of this plan node only (not the full tree).
    default String
    displayGraphviz()
    Graphviz DOT format display of the plan tree.
    default String
    displayIndent()
    Multi-line indented display of the full plan tree.
    default String
    displayIndentSchema()
    Multi-line indented display with schema information.
    default String
    displayPgJson()
    PostgreSQL-compatible JSON format display of the plan tree.
    static LogicalPlan
    fromBridge(LogicalPlanBridge bridge)
    Creates a LogicalPlan sealed interface variant from a bridge.
    static LogicalPlan
    fromBridgeTableScan(LogicalPlanBridge bridge)
    TableScan fallback: proto serialization loses projection indices and fetch, so we use variant-specific bridge accessors instead.
    static LogicalPlan
    fromBridgeUnsupported(LogicalPlanBridge bridge)
    Fallback for plan variants that datafusion-proto cannot encode: all LogicalPlan.Statement variants, LogicalPlan.Subquery, LogicalPlan.DescribeTable, LogicalPlan.Extension, and the DDL variants CreateMemoryTable, CreateIndex, DropTable, DropCatalogSchema, CreateFunction, DropFunction.
    List<LogicalPlan>
    inputs()
    Returns the direct child input plans of this node.
    default OptionalLong
    maxRows()
    Maximum possible output rows, or empty if unknown.
    org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.Schema
    schema()
    Returns the output schema of this plan node.

  • Method Details

    • schema

      org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.Schema schema()
      Returns the output schema of this plan node. 
      Schema schema = plan.schema();
      Returns:
      the Arrow schema
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: LogicalPlan::schema

    • inputs

      List<LogicalPlan> inputs()
      Returns the direct child input plans of this node. 
      List<LogicalPlan> children = plan.inputs();
      Returns:
      immutable list of child plans
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: LogicalPlan::inputs

    • bridge

      LogicalPlanBridge bridge()
      Returns the underlying bridge. Internal use only.
      Returns:
      the bridge

    • display

      default String display()
      Single-line display of this plan node only (not the full tree). 
      String nodeDesc = plan.display();
      Returns:
      a single-line description
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: LogicalPlan::display

    • displayIndent

      default String displayIndent()
      Multi-line indented display of the full plan tree. 
      String tree = plan.displayIndent();
      Returns:
      the indented plan tree string
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: LogicalPlan::display_indent

    • displayIndentSchema

      default String displayIndentSchema()
      Multi-line indented display with schema information. 
      String treeWithSchema = plan.displayIndentSchema();
      Returns:
      the indented plan tree string with schemas

      • Rust DataFusion: LogicalPlan::display_indent_schema

    • displayGraphviz

      default String displayGraphviz()
      Graphviz DOT format display of the plan tree. 
      String dot = plan.displayGraphviz();
      Returns:
      the plan in DOT language format
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: LogicalPlan::display_graphviz

    • displayPgJson

      default String displayPgJson()
      PostgreSQL-compatible JSON format display of the plan tree. 
      String json = plan.displayPgJson();
      Returns:
      the plan in PostgreSQL JSON format
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: LogicalPlan::display_pg_json

    • maxRows

      default OptionalLong maxRows()
      Maximum possible output rows, or empty if unknown. 
      OptionalLong max = plan.maxRows();
max.ifPresent(n -> System.out.println("At most " + n + " rows"));
      Returns:
      the maximum row count, or empty
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: LogicalPlan::max_rows

    • containsOuterReference

      default boolean containsOuterReference()
      Whether this plan contains references to outer columns (correlated subquery). 
      boolean correlated = plan.containsOuterReference();
      Returns:
      true if outer references exist
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: LogicalPlan::contains_outer_reference

    • close

      default void close()
      Closes this plan node and all its children, releasing native resources.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable

    • fromBridge

      static LogicalPlan fromBridge(LogicalPlanBridge bridge)
      Creates a LogicalPlan sealed interface variant from a bridge.

      This recursively materializes the entire plan tree. Variants that datafusion-proto supports are materialized via LogicalPlanProtoConverter.fromBridge(org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr.LogicalPlanBridge) (one FFI call per node returns proto bytes, the rest of the fields are decoded in Java). Variants that proto cannot encode — TableScan (lossy), Statement, Subquery, DescribeTable, Extension, and the subset of DDL variants listed in fromBridgeUnsupported(org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr.LogicalPlanBridge) — fall through to variant-specific bridge accessors.

      Parameters:
      bridge - the bridge wrapping the native plan
      Returns:
      the appropriate variant record

    • fromBridgeTableScan

      static LogicalPlan fromBridgeTableScan(LogicalPlanBridge bridge)
      TableScan fallback: proto serialization loses projection indices and fetch, so we use variant-specific bridge accessors instead. Called by LogicalPlanProtoConverter when it sees a ListingScan, ViewScan, CustomScan, or CteWorkTableScan proto variant.

    • fromBridgeUnsupported

      static LogicalPlan fromBridgeUnsupported(LogicalPlanBridge bridge)
      Fallback for plan variants that datafusion-proto cannot encode: all LogicalPlan.Statement variants, LogicalPlan.Subquery, LogicalPlan.DescribeTable, LogicalPlan.Extension, and the DDL variants CreateMemoryTable, CreateIndex, DropTable, DropCatalogSchema, CreateFunction, DropFunction.
